query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_acima_10, MAX(comissao) as max_comissao, MIN(comissao) as min_comissao, AVG(comissao) as avg_comissao FROM pro_rata WHERE comissao > 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_acima_10, MAX(comissao) as max_comissao, MIN(comissao) as min_comissao, AVG(comissao) as avg_comissao FROM pro_rata WHERE comissao > 10;
